description: Cross-language parity oracle for the DETERMINISTIC portion of a UUIDv7 (RFC 9562 §5.7): the 48-bit big-endian millisecond timestamp (first 12 hex chars) plus the version nibble ('7') and variant nibble (in {8,9,a,b}). The random tail is intentionally NOT pinned (it differs per call, and native currently uses a non-crypto tail — see the SecRandom follow-up). lib/uuid.ts::uuidv7(nowMs) and LariatModel/UuidV7.generate(nowMs:) both embed ms identically; tests/js/test-uuidv7-parity.mjs and UuidV7Tests.swift assert each generator's output against these rows so the shared-DB PK / sync_feed op_id format cannot drift between stacks. ts_hex = ms as a zero-padded 12-char lowercase big-endian hex string.
